objections.description: ES/hybrid adapter normalization not covered. Only PG adapter fix is detailed, but the benchmark covers PG, ES, and hybrid all needing the same schema. Section 3.1 should include ES and hybrid adapter fixes.
objections.suggested_fix: Add ES adapter and hybrid adapter field normalization sections similar to PGSearchAdapter fix. Verify ES also returns issuing_organ and body_plain.

objections.description: Schema only includes id, issuing_organ, body_plain, score, rank. The grader likely uses more fields (title, url, date, etc.) for hard_match and body_hits. This incomplete schema won't solve the benchmark fairness issue.
objections.suggested_fix: Audit the actual grader code to extract ALL required fields, not just the two mentioned. Expand the canonical schema to include all grading fields.

objections.description: No justification for why PG originally omitted these fields. The artifact assumes field omission without root cause analysis.
objections.suggested_fix: Include output from Phase 0 audit commands showing current PG adapter SQL and table schema to prove the analysis was done.

objections.description: Criterion 1 mentions 'identical field keys across PG, ES, and Hybrid' but the implementation only addresses PG.
objections.suggested_fix: Add acceptance criteria requiring ES and hybrid adapters to also return canonical schema.

suggestions.description: Add actual command outputs or screenshots showing Phase 0 audit results to prove the analysis foundation exists.
Show the exact line numbers in the SQL fix for PG adapter, e.g., 'UPDATE src/adapters/pg_search.py lines 45-50'.
